name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: None of these cases are about fairness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The lawsuit the Supreme Court agreed to hear isn't about fairness. It's not about so-called "election integrity," because millions of taxpayers' dollars have been wasted on state investigations looking for mail-in ballot fraud that simply does not exist.
This lawsuit is a political ploy to suppress legitimate mail-in ballots that are postmarked by Election Day and potentially delayed by the U.S. Postal Service. This lawsuit targets our fellow citizens who have done nothing wrong and might have their vote suppressed through delays out of their control. And it's all because the political party that brought the lawsuit knows that those delayed ballots are more likely to have been cast by voters for the other party and not themselves.
We cannot let anyone get away with such a cynical attempt at hidden voter suppression, no matter who controls the Supreme Court. RUSH $35 or more right now to help us spread the word about this lawsuit and defend the right to vote across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042126_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
DemocracyDocket: SCOTUS to Hear GOP Lawsuit That Could Radically Restrict Mail Voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042126_3&amount=25]
Team: Mail-in ballots are under attack again.
The Supreme Court agreed to hear arguments in RNC v. Wetzel, a lawsuit challenging Mississippi’s law allowing a five-day grace period for late-arriving ballots mailed by Election Day. In simpler terms, it's a case about whether your vote will count if you mail it on or before Election Day, but your ballot arrives after Election Day.
It's clear why a political party -- in this case, the Republican National Committee (RNC) -- is claiming that states must reject ballots that arrive after Election Day. Doing so would potentially disenfranchise a large number of voters, restricting the number of participants in an election. And the data is clear, over the last several election cycles, Republicans have been outnumbered in the use of mail-in ballots.
The RNC is making a blunt decision that their ability to win elections matters more than your vote. It's a cynical attempt to stay in power by suppressing ballots that are delivered late by the postal service. It's the kind of partisan work that shows they'd rather believe in their own power and control than the principles of democracy, of a country where all our votes should count, regardless of party.
Team: We cannot allow blatant partisanship to overrule our right to vote. Help make every mail-in ballot count in Mississippi and beyond with $35 or whatever you can today to make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042126_3&amount=35]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042126_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042126_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042126_3&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042126_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042126_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042126_3&amount=35]
Our position is clear: If your ballot was postmarked by Election Day, it should count.
This shouldn't be a partisan question. No political party -- Democrat, Republican, Green, Working Families, Libertarian, Reform, Conservative -- should be against voting. No party in our democracy should want to restrict the fundamental right of our fellow citizens to make their voice heard through voting.
But now we're facing a case where the Supreme Court’s decision could strike down or uphold laws in 16 states (and Washington D.C.) allowing late-arriving ballots postmarked on or before Election Day to be counted if they arrive within a set grace period.
How do we know what is at stake? Data from the 2024 Massachusetts elections shows that their three-day grace period for ballots to arrive after Election Day resulted in a 60% drop in rejected ballots as compared to no grace period. That means thousands of votes still counted, more than 1.5% of the total vote count. In a close election, that 1.5% could easily mean the difference between winning and losing.
Our fundamental right to vote should matter so much more than a partisan desperation to win. Chip in $35 or whatever you can to help us defend the use of mail-in ballots and make every vote count in elections nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042126_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=042126_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=042126_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=xmU0LFjZ8LAwJXzxjVVitb7fxcrTs8GMP%2BRO2xzSG3FVB5fNi8Ygr7xVLE8EWvdZEM%2FV%2FIncNXqLfDIfafbgthct5f9PhtEM8wKDV0nrity6Ysz8MrHuZC7Crai5IOxCX%2F5uT3xZUzCbKz7kn3mz5mqy6sEpw2tEp%2BH1pH3mdqDFa0nYYxHxIgUlTMWF3e3ARjLHp4vbrTTPcMIt6qp%2FvpKf2x4CoF3v2%2FaCtA8e0dYxahlXTpFNRbNurwZE9FYV0QzJmyFD7fRJi0pZegbV9ZTqdVS%2FO6JLHj%2FCCq2YOXL7gljRSwHaV64tvmzEG1nWOu61rU6IBrPU2%2Fjt7HgLzkOenxbNLXbXAvNasZ9BhJY3SqVRPQWf3cQzDhK587QEsVFnbavaOCwno0cOjlOBmAVN0WxyKQpZEhASojDe8ok%3D .

name: Dr. Kristin Hook
subject: “we need you here,” she said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kristin Hook for Congress
body:
this is the moment that changed everything for me.

|
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914618/615976638/-1456264782?refcode=KH_ATA_EM_FR_CecileRichardsRS_260421_i_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhNTk4YTMtZGUzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WvdykMIUdllcoj1yUJhkkddrDTO_F6Y8wSViyAQu2hE=) Team,

[_**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in to help us win this race.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914619/615976639/-1456264782?refcode=KH_ATA_EM_FR_CecileRichardsRS_260421_i_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhNTk4YTMtZGUzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WvdykMIUdllcoj1yUJhkkddrDTO_F6Y8wSViyAQu2hE=) But first, I want to tell you about a moment that changed everything for me.

After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was furious, heartbroken, and honestly questioning whether I could call Texas home anymore given how hostile it is to women like me.

So I went to the Texas Capitol to protest. And that’s when I happened to run into one of my lifelong heroes, Cecile Richards – the former president of Planned Parenthood, and one of the defining voices for women’s rights in this country.

I told her I had just moved back to Texas from D.C., and how devastated I was by what was happening.

She looked at me and said something I’ll never forget: _**“Thank you for moving back. We need you here.”**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914620/615976640/-1456264782?refcode=KH_ATA_EM_FR_CecileRichardsRS_260421_i_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhNTk4YTMtZGUzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WvdykMIUdllcoj1yUJhkkddrDTO_F6Y8wSViyAQu2hE=) That moment stayed with me.

Because it made something click: **I’m not the kind of person who walks away when things get hard.**

So I gave up my apartment, put everything in storage, and spent six months working and living wherever I could just to save enough money to run for Congress. I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines while our rights were being taken away.

[_**And now, I’m asking you to be part of what comes next. Can you join my campaign with a donation of $5 or $10 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914621/615976641/-1456264782?refcode=KH_ATA_EM_FR_CecileRichardsRS_260421_i_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhNTk4YTMtZGUzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WvdykMIUdllcoj1yUJhkkddrDTO_F6Y8wSViyAQu2hE=)

Because this race isn’t just about one seat. It’s about who gets to make decisions for women in Texas and across this country.

Right now, those decisions are being made by people who don’t care to understand what’s at stake for women. The only way that changes is if we change who’s in power. And this race will help decide that.

If we win, I will be the first woman and Latina to represent TX-21, and the first woman in American history to serve in Congress with a STEM PhD. That means having someone in the room who will actually fight for women, protect our rights, and base decisions on facts – not extremist ideologies.

**We have a chance to make history.**

[_**Will you chip in $10 or $15 today to help us win this race and send a new kind of leadership to Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914622/615976642/-1456264782?refcode=KH_ATA_EM_FR_CecileRichardsRS_260421_i_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhNTk4YTMtZGUzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WvdykMIUdllcoj1yUJhkkddrDTO_F6Y8wSViyAQu2hE=)

With Gratitude,
Dr. Kristin Hook [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914623/615976643/-1456264782?refcode=KH_ATA_EM_FR_CecileRichardsRS_260421_i_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhNTk4YTMtZGUzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WvdykMIUdllcoj1yUJhkkddrDTO_F6Y8wSViyAQu2hE=)

* * *
---
|
---
| Dr. Kristin Hook for Congress
P.O. Box 17834
San Antonio, TX 78217
---

| Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/TmXjIOohu0eIHmtkBUzE7A2?unsubscribedata=jxYBfyOWExqTNOzHGPZ43wqeAjbTIS3mO10bsT%2Fia4uE%2BYQyduylv%2Bep7t7mJ7tn3%2BpZkxZuZ6YhnhYyfSAvPMnPWqZST93SXgdAnnWXDSEKdaYxz%2FC3U2oDLyHMj21oAqTFGC%2BtZhrrW451g5Qj3AU7a55AtOeTMJhx0%2BfSuf5gUfp%2BltA%2FY%2FsDnvddUcJERcWUo7G5f%2Bh%2FluBVwrYRzehuvc9oeGvgW0nIbjkaAo5LW0%2F0SnzymMhjDZf1x%2BuJpob5I6r7%2BkANHmRTkRuaoIMHLGgAey6Q9QeBRGKq0Ji%2FDnpROykDdlmVwtBIrjlu67wk%2BpqCvHq8bn%2B%2Fvr%2BVYDhGxKbDlOF8UZp7Vp3EwgeO6NJTs7fUPTlGYs7Oy%2BBFiroFXUL2pml0Qv9BwgqxhazTPsxp1%2FIWksaFovdJYkWkOtOTJCOCV537jz%2FWqQDT).
---

name: The Democrats
subject: Don’t delete this email
body:
---
**Please don’t delete this email!** Derek, we know that you get a _lot_ of emails about fundraising from other organizations. Let us explain why it’s so important that we hit our goals: While Republican candidates and MAGA super PACs receive millions of dollars from Trump’s billionaire cronies, we rely on grassroots supporters like _you_ to power our work. And here’s the deal, Derek: We can’t win without you. Winning back Congress this year will require around-the-clock work and a massive amount of resources. That means that to keep up, we need our most committed supporters to donate early and often so we can build the grassroots infrastructure we’ll need to win tough races from Ohio to Alaska. [**If you’re ready to flip the House and Senate, then we’re asking you to pitch in $7 today to the DNC to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, all across the country →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260421_6815_fr&refcode2=6815_22930333_VyYoYo&akid=6815%2E22930333%2EVyYoYo) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260421_6815_fr&refcode2=6815_22930333_VyYoYo&akid=6815%2E22930333%2EVyYoYo)**

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: sorry for the late email
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
I know emails like this can be a bit annoying (sorry!). But the truth is, they really are necessary.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914838/615981021/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmYzkwYTItZGYzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=elrDWHsRb49hYNj-PVUkym1UWcIahfAOa9WJXiGPfuw=) Hi there, it’s Janelle. Sorry for the late email, but I promise to keep this short. [**We’re facing a big end-of-month fundraising deadline next week — and we’re not quite where we need to be.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914839/615981022/-2128870824?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&amount=5&refcode=email_042126_sorry&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmYzkwYTItZGYzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=elrDWHsRb49hYNj-PVUkym1UWcIahfAOa9WJXiGPfuw=) [_**Will you pitch in and help us catch up?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914840/615981023/-2128870824?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&amount=5&refcode=email_042126_sorry&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmYzkwYTItZGYzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=elrDWHsRb49hYNj-PVUkym1UWcIahfAOa9WJXiGPfuw=) Look, I know emails like this can be a bit annoying (sorry!). But the truth is, they really are necessary. In 2024, I was one of the ONLY Democrats to flip a Republican-held seat, and we won by an incredibly narrow margin. That win wasn’t by accident. It was because people like you stepped up to help us secure a historic victory. This year, national Republicans are DETERMINED to flip this district red again. They’re prepared to say, do, and spend whatever it takes to beat Democrats like me. _That includes tapping into Donald Trump’s $500 MILLION war chest._ **[It’s so important that we meet our monthly fundraising goal so that we can keep up the fight against Trump and his disastrous agenda. If you’re with me, I’d be so grateful if you would pitch in $5 to help us catch up:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914841/615981024/-2128870824?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&amount=5&refcode=email_042126_sorry&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmYzkwYTItZGYzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=elrDWHsRb49hYNj-PVUkym1UWcIahfAOa9WJXiGPfuw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129914842/615981025/-2128870824?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,500&amount=5&refcode=email_042126_sorry&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmYzkwYTItZGYzZC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=elrDWHsRb49hYNj-PVUkym1UWcIahfAOa9WJXiGPfuw=)

name: Jena G.
subject: Help me stand up for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg? [secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?]
Peter,
After January 6th, we saw exactly what was at stake.
Extremists attacked our elections. They threatened election workers, spread lies, and tried to take control.
As Secretary of State, I took action. We made it a crime to threaten election workers. We banned guns near polling places. We protected Colorado’s democracy.
And when Tina Peters tried to interfere with our elections, I removed her from direct election oversight and helped make sure she was held accountable.
I was told to stay quiet. That going after Trump and his allies was “too partisan.”
So I got even louder. If we don’t stand up when democracy is on the line, then what are we doing?
I’ve never backed down from a tough fight. And I’m not about to start now.
I’m running for Attorney General because Colorado deserves someone who won’t back down from extremists, won’t take orders from party leaders, and won’t stay silent when it matters most.
But building a campaign that can win statewide takes resources. Can you chip in today to help us keep fighting and win this race? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?]
I will not let this Administration disenfranchise our voters, intimidate our election workers, or threaten our democracy.
As your next Attorney General, I will fight for you.
Jena
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States
